title: Vecchia guardia
writer: Livio Apolloni, Alessandro Blasetti, Giuseppe Zucca
actors: Gianfranco Giachetti, Mino Doro, Franco Brambilla
plot: The film is set in a small Italian town in 1922, where a local group of Fascist blackshirts battle against rival socialists who have called a strike at the hospital. Mario, the young son of Doctor Cardini, is killed in the fighting.
